commit.message:
Add certificate auth properties to staticwebapp.config.json schema (#5452)

Add clientSecretCertificateKeyVaultReference and
clientSecretCertificateThumbprint to the azureActiveDirectory registration
object. These properties are needed for certificate-based authentication
as documented at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/static-web-apps/authentication-custom

Fixes https://github.com/Azure/static-web-apps-cli/issues/944

Co-authored-by: Tim Fendt <tfendt@vistaequitypartners.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix THETA SWARM ML init: use 'is not None' instead of truthiness check on unfitted RF

sklearn's RandomForestClassifier.__len__ accesses estimators_ which only
exists post-fit. 'if self.object_classifier:' triggered __len__ on an
unfitted model, causing AttributeError and silently nulling both classifiers.

Both classifiers now train and are available for hardware veto.

Also removed stale SQLite cache files (cad_data_cache, orbital_elements_cache)
that were incompatible with shelve's dbm format, eliminating
"Cache read/write error: db type could not be determined" noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release: SROI meta-analysis replication package and web repository

- Quarto website (7 pages): empirical patterns, quality analysis,
  calculation elements, simulations, literature, replication
- Analysis code: analysis.py, simulations.py, factors_analysis.py
- Data: sroi_clean_dataset.csv, sroi_factors.csv, sroi_ratios_subset.csv
- 16 figures (sectors, quality, bootstrap CIs, Monte Carlo, cascade)
- docs/ pre-built for GitHub Pages deployment

commit.message:
refactor: kill duck-typing — NormalizedResponse + ProviderProtocol

All LLM adapters (Google, Mistral, Anthropic) now normalize vendor
responses at their boundary into a single NormalizedResponse type.
Downstream code uses typed field access instead of hasattr/getattr
chains. ~30 hasattr/getattr calls eliminated across engine, chamber,
summarizer, agent, services, and api.

- Add NormalizedResponse, StreamDelta, StreamingProvider, ChamberProvider
- Rewrite adapters to return NormalizedResponse at boundary
- Collapse _extract_tool_calls from 25 lines to 5
- Delete _AdapterResponse, _StreamedResponse, _BuiltToolCall, _StreamDelta
- Replace FakeToolCall/FakeFunction with ToolUse across 7 test files
- 879 tests pass, -286 lines net

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Clean up defensive fallbacks in audit success page

Remove unnecessary "key in t.success" guards — all dictionary keys
now exist in both EN and JP dictionaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add permission: keyword to config convenience methods (#140)

* Add PermissionRegistry, AdminAuthorization, and NavigationRegistry permission: support

Foundation for declarative RBAC across all panda gems and host apps:

- PermissionRegistry: register controller action → permission mappings
- AdminAuthorization concern: reads registry, delegates to authorize!
- NavigationRegistry: permission: key on sections and items auto-filters
  based on config.authorization_policy

Without panda-cms-pro, default policy is user.admin? (safe default).
With Pro, the role-based policy enables non-admin access via roles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add themeable sidebar gradient and additional_head_content config

- Make .bg-gradient-admin use CSS custom properties (--gradient-admin-from,
  --gradient-admin-to) so host apps can override sidebar colors per theme
- Add additional_head_content config option (lambda returning HTML) for
  host apps to inject theme stylesheets, fonts, etc. into <head>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add responsive card view to TableComponent for mobile

On screens below lg breakpoint, tables render as stacked cards instead
of horizontal tables. First column becomes the card title, remaining
columns show as label/value pairs. Empty values are hidden.

Enabled by default (responsive: true). Can be disabled per table with
responsive: false for tables that work well on mobile as-is.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add global admin search with Searchable concern and sidebar search bar

- Extend SearchRegistry with admin_search method returning grouped results
- Add Panda::Core::Searchable concern for models to register as searchable
- Add Admin::SearchController endpoint at GET /admin/search
- Add SearchBarComponent integrated into the sidebar with Cmd+K shortcut
- Add global-search Stimulus controller with debounced input, keyboard
  navigation, and grouped dropdown results

Models include the concern and declare searchable fields:

  include Panda::Core::Searchable
  searchable do |s|
    s.fields :first_name, :last_name, :email
    s.display ->(r) { r.full_name }
    s.path ->(r) { "/admin/people/#{r.id}" }
    s.icon "fa-solid fa-users"
    s.group "People"
  end

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix NavigationRegistry.reset! to re-register default user menu

reset! clears all class-level sections, including the "My Account"
bottom section registered during Configuration#initialize. This
caused order-dependent test failures when nested_navigation_spec
ran before logins_spec.

Re-registering defaults after clearing ensures the user menu is
always present after a reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add permission: keyword to config convenience methods

Pass through permission: to NavigationRegistry.section and
NavigationRegistry.item from insert_admin_menu_section and
insert_admin_menu_item, so host apps can use declarative
permission gating without calling NavigationRegistry directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix before_action ordering for AdminAuthorization

Move AdminAuthorization include after set_current_request_details and
authenticate_admin_user! before_actions. Rails executes before_actions
in registration order, so including AdminAuthorization first caused
enforce_registry_permissions! to run before current_user was set,
blocking all registered controllers with "no permission."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add README and remove links.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(hearth,poller): allow killing PID-less workers and populate epic Blocks

Hearth's Shift+K kill command silently did nothing for Crucible workers
because they have PID=0. Remove the PID>0 gate — the daemon already
handles PID=0 gracefully (skips process kill, still marks worker failed).

The poller now reconstructs the parent bead's Blocks list from children's
Parent references. bd ready returns children with a parent field but the
parent itself has no blocks array, so IsCrucibleCandidate always returned
false and epics fell through to the legacy branch-only path instead of
the Crucible orchestration path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix all ESLint errors + audit form a11y + localization

- Add role="alert" + aria-describedby + aria-invalid to form error messages
- Localize mobile nav, audit footer, and progress bar strings (EN+JP)
- Fix React 19 purity: eliminate all setState-in-effect violations
  - Confetti/sparkle particles → lazy useState initializer
  - Audit locale → getInitialLocale() instead of effect
  - Progress bar → pure render (no refs during render)
  - Slide animation → rAF wrapper for exit transitions
  - Form wizard → moved animation trigger to click handlers
- Remove unused imports/props (Share2, Database, Lock, OwnershipItem, etc.)
- ESLint: 0 errors, 0 warnings across entire src/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 7z listing shows archive itself + missing entries (3 parsing bugs)

1. Archive metadata block misread as file entry
   7z l -slt outputs a metadata block first (Path = archive.7z, Type = 7z...)
   followed by the first "----------". The old code yielded that block as a
   file entry, causing the .7z file itself to appear in the listing.
   Fix: skip yield on the first "----------" (pastHeader flag).

2. Windows backslashes broke subdirectory grouping
   7z on Windows outputs "folder\file.txt" with backslashes. ListDirectory
   splits on '/' so nested entries weren't grouped → most files missing.
   Fix: normalise '\' to '/' in ReadEntries.

3. Folder = + not handled
   .7z archives mark directories with "Folder = +" not just "Attributes = D".
   Fix: handle the Folder key alongside Attributes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release — XCPlaylist v1.0.0

Lightning-fast ad-free IPTV player with Xtream Codes support.

Features:
- Live TV, VOD, and Series playback via Xtream Codes API
- HEVC/H.265 support via mpegts.js, HLS via HLS.js
- Server-side FFmpeg audio transcoding (AC3/EAC3/DTS → AAC)
- Auto-detection of unsupported audio codecs with automatic fix
- EPG (Electronic Program Guide) with full XMLTV support
- Format cycling (TS, HLS, MP4) with per-stream memory
- Favorites, watch history, continue watching, reminders
- Channel zapping (up/down arrows)
- macOS native titlebar with traffic lights
- Windows support with NSIS installer
- Cross-platform FFmpeg bundling via extraResources

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add app entry point with file-mode pipeline and demo lighting

Main application orchestrating the full audio analysis pipeline:
- AppConfig dataclass with CLI argument parsing (argparse)
- File mode: loads audio via librosa, runs all 7 analyzers offline,
  assembles per-frame MusicState, plays back at 60fps
- _assemble_music_state maps analyzer frames to MusicState 1:1
- generate_demo_commands: stub lighting engine (energy→color pars,
  beat→strobe, sub_bass→UV) as placeholder for real lighting engine
- Transport handling: play/pause/seek from WebSocket clients
- Optional UDP output to physical fixtures via encode_packet
- 15 tests covering assembly, demo lighting (incl. fuzz), and CLI

commit.message:
docs: restructure navigation — 4 tabs + Chat FAB

Replace chat-as-tab with floating action button pattern. New structure:
- Home tab: combined balance + pots graph visual, proactive insight cards
- Payments tab: beneficiary list + recent payments
- Activity tab: transaction history (date-grouped, PFCv2 categories)
- Profile tab: account details, settings, sign out
- Chat FAB: floating button on all tabs, opens full-screen chat modal
  iOS floating bar with dynamic adjustment, Android standard FAB
  Badge for unread proactive insights

Home is the default landing screen. Chat is omnipresent via FAB.
Pre-login state (login screen) has no tabs/FAB visible.
Onboarding: FAB auto-opens on first launch for new users.

ADR-11 rewritten. 3 new EX-Infra tasks: EXI-13 (tab layout + ChatFAB),
EXI-14 (Home screen), EXI-15 (Payments screen). EX total 47→50 tasks.
